channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Surgeon General Pick Means Lacks Votes to Be Confirmed
item.description: Two Republican senators say they remain undecided on voting to confirm Dr. Casey Means, President Donald Trump's nominee for surgeon general, Politico...

item.title: Bill Clinton faces high-stakes House grilling in Epstein probe after Hillary blasts 'fishing expedition'
item.description: House Oversight Republicans prepare to grill Bill Clinton in Chappaqua on Friday. Chairman James Comer expects the deposition to last longer than Hill...

item.title: Swalwell campaign sets off alarm bells after accepting $25K donation from CCP-tied lawyer: 'Outrageous'
item.description: Eric Swalwell’s bid for governor gets another boost from a CCP-linked donor after Fox News Digital previously highlighted his ties to the CCP bankroll...

item.title: Mayor Karen Bass Feigns Ignorance of the LA Skid Row Dog Crisis, So PETA Begs Gavin Newsom to Intervene
Trump to Tout Economy, Energy in Texas Ahead of GOP Primaries
item.description: President Donald Trump will travel to southern Texas on Friday to tout his economic and fossil fuel agenda, just days before Republicans face competit...

item.title: Now It's Noem: DHS Secretary Says Elon Musk Helped Discover Deep State Spying Software on Her Devices
Vance says 'no chance' US will get into prolonged Middle East war amid Iran tensions
item.description: Vice President JD Vance told The Washington Post that "there is no chance" the U.S. will get into a protracted war in the Middle East as tensions rise...

item.title: LA Firefighter Retaliated Against for Noting Lachman Fire Wasn't Extinguished, Leading to Palisades Blaze
Newsom staffer who told California reporter to 'f--- off' is raking in massive taxpayer-funded salary
item.description: State records show that the communications director for Gov. Gavin Newsom earns a hefty six-figure salary as critics slam him for telling a reporter t...

item.title: Hillary Clinton Blasts Oversight Panel on Epstein Probe: 'Partisan Political Theater'
item.description: Hillary Clinton tore into the Republican-led House Oversight Committee as "playing games" and engaging in a "cover-up" ahead of her closed-door deposi...

item.title: $1 Million to $343 Million: Minnesota’s Autism Spending Explosion Demands Answers
DOJ Sues 5 More States Over Voter Roll Access
item.description: The Department of Justice announced Friday it has filed lawsuits against five additional states for failing to produce voter registration lists.

item.title: Democrats Eat Their Own: Outsider Candidates Blast DCCC for Rigging 2026 Primaries, 'Narrowing Democracy'
Where Iran’s ballistic missiles can reach — and how close they are to the US
item.description: Trump warns Iran missiles could "soon reach" U.S. as tensions escalate. Iran's current arsenal threatens American forces across Middle East bases.

item.title: Emerson Poll: Vance, Newsom Lead for 2028
item.description: A new Emerson College Polling survey released Thursday shows California Gov. Gavin Newsom holding a narrow lead in a crowded Democrat primary field wh...
